subcodes.first_line: O ancient companion and longstanding friend! Praise be unto God, through the grace and bounty of the Abhá Beauty, from the clime of Europe [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای یار قدیم و دوست دیرین الحمد لله بفضل و موهبت جمال ابهی از اقلیم اروپا
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @travels to the West by Abdu'l-Baha, @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @growth of the Cause
